seoTitle: How to Create a Form in Airtable: Fillable Survey
metaDescription: Build a fillable Airtable form with conditional logic, required fields, and a shareable link that submits responses straight into your table.
intro: Airtable's Form View turns any table into a shareable data-collection form, complete with conditional logic and required fields, so responses land directly in your grid without any manual entry. This guide covers building the form, customizing its presentation, and sharing or embedding the final link.

steps.heading: Open the views toolbar
steps.body: Go to the bottom views toolbar in your target table where existing views are listed.

steps.heading: Create a Form View
steps.body: Click to create a new Form View, which links automatically to your active database table.

steps.heading: Choose which fields appear
steps.body: Drag and drop fields to add or remove specific questions from the survey.

steps.heading: Customize labels and requirements
steps.body: Edit field labels, add help text, and mark specific inputs as required to enforce data integrity.

steps.heading: Apply conditional logic
steps.body: Set up advanced conditional logic to show or hide questions based on how previous questions were answered.

steps.heading: Customize design and share the link
steps.body: Add a cover photo and post-submission thank-you message, then generate the shareable link or copy the HTML embed code.

faq.question: Do form responses go straight into my Airtable table?
faq.answer: Yes, every form submission automatically creates a new record in the linked table with no extra import step needed.

faq.question: Can I show or hide questions based on previous answers?
faq.answer: Yes, Airtable forms support conditional logic that displays specific fields only when certain earlier answers are given.

faq.question: Can I embed the form on my own website?
faq.answer: Yes, Airtable provides an HTML embed code alongside the shareable link so you can add the form to an external page.

faq.question: Can I require certain fields to be filled before submission?
faq.answer: Yes, each field in the form can individually be marked as required.
